name: @prune/cache-reconcile
description: U3 — cache-hit reconciliation. Closes the loop on cache planning: compares the PREDICTED cache-read tokens (from a cache planner) against the REALIZED cache-read tokens the provider actually reported (usage.cache_read_input_tokens), and flags when a paid cache-write investment under-performed (stranded write multiplier). Deterministic comparison; both sides caller-supplied; insufficient_signal when either is unknown; never fabricates. No regex, no model.
